description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular body crafted from light-colored wood with a subtle grain pattern, giving it a natural and modern appearance. The front face is dominated by a single, darker wood drawer, accented with two round, gold-colored knobs for easy access. The nightstand stands on four slender, tapered wooden legs that provide stability and a touch of mid-century style. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing lamps, books, or decorative items. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain continuing seamlessly around the structure. There are no visible decorative carvings or inlays, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design.
description: A light wood nightstand with a single dark wood drawer, gold knobs, and tapered legs, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark wood drawer with two gold knobs and the tapered legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain light wood grain and the depth of the nightstand.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a seamless, undecorated light wood panel and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the plain wood grain and leg structure.
